mainText:
Welcome to Bank of Entitlement, where overdraft fees are just a suggestion! Get ready to experience banking like never before, because here, you're always right. Sign up now and start living the entitled life you deserve!

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, imagine this: I stroll into my favorite caf, ready to order my usual triple-shot, half-caf, soy latte with a sprinkle of organic cinnamon. But, oh no, they've run out of soy milk! I mean, the nerve, right? Without missing a beat, I loudly announce, "This is unacceptable! I demand not just any soy milk, but imported, hand-squeezed almond milk flown in from Italy, pronto!" The barista looks stunned, but I stand my ground, insisting on nothing but the best for my morning fix. After a tense five minutes (or what felt like an eternity in my world), a flustered employee rushes in with the coveted almond milk, apologizing profusely for the inconvenience. As I take that first sip, I can't help but smirk triumphantly. Another entitlement win for Hot Josh!
